content.situation: 和同事在办公室结束一天的工作，准备下班，双方约定明天继续讨论项目进展
content.speakerText: I'm heading out now, but let's pick up where we left off tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 我先走了，不过我们明天接着昨天的继续聊。

blanks.answer: I'll send you the updates before I leave.
options: I'll send you the updates before I leave.
I will leave you the updates before I leave.
I send you the updates before I leave.
I'm sending you the updates before I leave.

content.hint: 表达‘我会在走之前发你更新内容’，使用将来时和正确动词结构
content.knowledgePoint: 将来时表达承诺与后续行动

content.situation: 和朋友在咖啡馆聊完天，准备分别，双方计划周末再约
content.speakerText: This was awesome—let’s do this again soon!
content.speakerTextCn: 这太棒了，咱们尽快再约一次吧！

blanks.answer: Let me know what works for you next weekend.
options: Let me know what works for you next weekend.
Tell me what work for you next weekend.
I will tell you what work for you next weekend.
You tell me what works for you next weekend.

content.hint: 表达‘你告诉我下周什么时间方便’，使用让步句型和正确语序
content.knowledgePoint: 提议后续安排的礼貌请求表达

content.situation: 线上会议结束，团队成员互相道别并约定下周同步进展
content.speakerText: Alright, I’ll wrap this up—catch you all next week!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我先结束会议了，下周再聊！

blanks.answer: I’ll have the report ready by Monday.
options: I’ll have the report ready by Monday.
I have the report ready by Monday.
I’m having the report ready by Monday.
I should have the report ready by Monday.

content.hint: 表达‘我将在周一前准备好报告’，强调承诺与时间节点的自然表达
content.knowledgePoint: 承诺性将来时表达（will have）
